creator: mibelanger@qnx.com
text:
This problem will occur with "devctl detach igc0"

In iflib it is typical to call the following:
	IFDI_DETACH(ctx);
	IFDI_QUEUES_FREE(ctx);

In if_igc.c:
 - igc_if_detach calls igc_free_pci_resources.
 - igc_if_queues_free function calls igc_release_hw_control.

igc_if_queues_free must not call igc_release_hw_control, as the hw resource has been free'd in the detach call.

It should be sufficient to ensure that igc_release_hw_control is called just prior to any call to igc_free_pci_resource, which appears to be the case.  The extra call to igc_release_hw_control in igc_if_queues_free is unnecessary.

One could consider moving the release_hw_control into the implementation of igc_free_pci_resources.
